name: Hello World
description:
Create a Hello World web app. The user should be able to enter a name and receive back a greeting.

## Implementation Plan

A minimal single-page web application:
- Text input for the user name
- Submit button + Enter key support
- Greeting rendered dynamically ("Hello, [Name]!") without page reload

### Architecture
- Backend: Node.js + Express
  - GET /greet?name= → JSON { greeting: "Hello, <name>!" }
  - Falls back to "Hello, World!" when name is empty
  - Serves static frontend from public/
  - Configurable PORT (default 3000), `npm start` entry point
- Frontend: vanilla HTML + CSS + JS, no frameworks
  - Fetches /greet on submit, renders greeting in-place
- No database required
- Repo named: hello-world-1160af53-3802-40f7-a83f-ecd694175a27

### Acceptance Criteria
- `npm install && npm start` brings up the app
- User enters name, submits, sees greeting without full reload
- README included with setup and usage instructions
